faqs.question: What pests are most common in East Harlem apartments?
faqs.answer: East Harlem properties commonly face German cockroaches, mice, rats, and ants due to the neighborhood's dense housing and older building stock. Our general pest control service addresses all these pests with comprehensive treatment plans that include inspection, extermination, and prevention strategies tailored to your specific situation.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day pest control service in East Harlem?
faqs.answer: Yes! We understand that pest problems require urgent attention, which is why we offer same-day service throughout East Harlem whenever possible. Call us in the morning, and we'll do our best to have a licensed technician at your door the same day to assess and treat your pest issue.
